texto: Stop chasing society’s definition of success and chase your own definition of success. Success is an emotion that is experienced when you are completely fulfilled and content with where you are in life; it has nothing to do with a specific job, a specific amount of money in your bank account, or the quality of material possessions you acquire. You can be the richest man in the world, but still, feel unsuccessful, and you can be the poorest man in the world, but still, feel extremely successful.
explicacao: Citação de Kyle D. Jones sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Stop chasing society’s definition of success and chase your own definition of success. Success is…” articula motivacao, be-yourself, beauty em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e beauty.
